title: excoecaria poilanei
intro: Excoecaria poilanei, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is native to Vietnam and is also known as the "Poilane's excoecaria". It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Excoecaria poilanei include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various infectious diseases. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies such as extracts, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments.
